name: White Tassel Hamburgers
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Jar of strained beef or veal baby food
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, baby food, and broth in a bowl. Refrigerate, tightly covered, for at least 2 hours.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls and flatten them slightly.
3. Fry the patties in a pan on the stovetop until cooked through.
4. Mix together the onion and water to form a paste.
5. Place approximately 1 tablespoon of the onion/water mixture in the bottom of the pan.
6. Flip the burger patties onto the onion mixture.
7. Serve immediately after cooking is complete. Cut hot dog buns into pieces that are the same size as the hamburgers for serving.
